response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack and web software developer but completely lacks the critical hardware engineering skills required for this role. There is no evidence of experience with System-on-Chip (SoC) modeling, hardware-software co-design, or deep-learning workload optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Over 15 years of robust software engineering experience across full-stack, web, and microservices architectures.
Proven ability to build high-performance, low-latency software systems using languages like DLang and Node.js.
Strong track record of technical leadership, open-source contributions, and organizing developer workshops.
concerns: No experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks required expertise in deep neural network training and inference optimization at the hardware level.
No background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or AI accelerator power-optimization.
